mutation.explanation: A single dose pair satisfies lower-95 mutation and viability thresholds across all targeted tissues.

fucci.explanation: S-phase fold and leakage meet thresholds at one or more dose pairs.

washout.explanation: Washout fit quality is below threshold in one or more tissue/mark pairs (worst R²=0.739, floor=0.900).

synergy.explanation: Bootstrap stability supports a consistent optimum under viability constraints.

gate_definitions.mutation_rule: exists dose: lower95(mutation_reduction)>=2 and lower95(viability)>=viability_threshold and all tissues meet same rule
gate_definitions.washout_rule: for every tissue/mark pair: finite half-life CI, mean R^2>=washout_r2_floor, finite_fraction>=0.95
